bird.name: Crested bellbird
bird.summary: The crested bellbird (Oreoica gutturalis) is a medium-sized passerine bird in the family Oreoicidae. It is native to drier parts of Austral…

locations.name: 澳大利亚
locations.summary: 澳大利亚联邦（英語：Commonwealth of Australia），通称澳大利亚、澳洲（Australia，缩写为AU、AUS），是一个位于南半球中北部、東半球东部的議會制君主立憲制、聯邦制國家。全国整体属于大洋洲（並非自成一洲），…

relations.subject: Crested bellbird
relations.evidence: It is native to drier parts of Australia where its typical habitats are acacia scrublands, eucalypt woodlands, spinifex and saltbush plains, and dunes

relations.subject: Crested bellbird
relations.evidence: The crested bellbird's habitat is usually found throughout the semi-arid coastlines and towards the drier interior areas of Australia, particularly in areas dominated by acacia scrublands, eucalypt woodlands, spinifex and chenopod (saltbush) plains or dunes."Birdlife," n.d
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: Crested bellbird
relations.evidence: The range of the crested bellbird has been contracted due to habitat destruction from land clearance, as this species is particularly susceptible to fragmentation."Birds in Backyards," n.d
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
